nodes.name: navigate-to-routes.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for Angular routing navigation covering both declarative navigation with RouterLink and programmatic navigation via the Router service, including router.navigate() and router.navigateByUrl() with URL parameter handling.

nodes.name: outputs.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for Angular component outputs and custom event emission, covering function-based outputs, configuration options, programmatic subscription, decorator-based @Output, and best practices.

nodes.name: reactive-forms.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for Angular reactive forms covering core classes (FormGroup, FormControl, FormArray), setup, template binding, accessing controls, updating values, unified change events, and manual state management.

nodes.name: rendering-strategies.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide comparing Angular rendering strategies including Client-Side Rendering (CSR), Static Site Generation (SSG/Prerendering), Server-Side Rendering (SSR), hydration, and a decision matrix for choosing between them.

nodes.name: resource.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for Angular's async reactivity `resource` API, covering basic usage, aborting requests, reloading data, resource status signals, local mutation, and the httpResource extension for reactive data fetching.

nodes.name: route-animations.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for Angular route transition animations using the View Transitions API, covering enabling view transitions, customizing with CSS, advanced control patterns, and best practices.

nodes.name: route-guards.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for Angular route guards covering the types of guards (canActivate, canDeactivate, canLoad, etc.), creating guard functions, applying guards to routes, return values, and security notes.

nodes.name: router-lifecycle.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for Angular router lifecycle events in chronological order, including how to subscribe to events, debug router navigation, and common use cases for listening to router events.

nodes.name: router-testing.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for testing Angular routing using RouterTestingHarness, covering setup, example configurations, key concepts, writing navigation tests, and best practices for router unit tests.

nodes.name: show-routes-with-outlets.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for Angular router outlets covering basic outlet usage, nested outlets, named/secondary outlets, outlet lifecycle events, and passing data via routerOutletData.

nodes.name: signal-forms.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive reference guide for Angular signal-based forms, covering imports, form creation, validation, FieldState vs FormField distinction, disabled/readonly/hidden fields, reactive forms integration, state access, submission, error handling, async validation, conditional validation, common pitfalls, a complete big-form example, and build error recovery.

nodes.name: signals-overview.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for Angular's signals reactivity system, covering writable signals, readonly signal exposure, computed signals, reactive contexts, untracked reads, and async operations within reactive contexts.

nodes.name: tailwind-css.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for integrating Tailwind CSS with Angular, covering both automated setup (ng add) and manual Tailwind v4 setup steps including dependency installation, PostCSS configuration, and import setup.

nodes.name: template-driven-forms.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for Angular template-driven forms covering core directives, setup with FormsModule, template building with ngModel two-way binding, form and control state, validation and error messages, form submission, and resetting.

nodes.name: testing-fundamentals.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for Angular testing fundamentals emphasizing an async-first philosophy, covering basic test structure with TestBed and ComponentFixture for component testing.
